tasks.subject: Task 1: SettingsRow primitive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a reusable grouped-row component (label + optional value / right slot, with `disabled` and `danger` variants) and export it.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/components/SettingsRow.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/components/index.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- renders label (textPresets.body, text.primary)
- value mono right-aligned; right node wins over value
- onPress -> Pressable w/ pressedOpacity; else View
- disabled -> opacity 0.45, non-pressable, a11y disabled
- danger -> label colors.text.danger
- no card/border/divider drawn by component
- exported from components/index.ts
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/SettingsRow.tsx", "mobile/components/index.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders label", "value/right slot", "pressable when onPress and not disabled", "disabled dims + a11y", "danger red label", "no card/divider drawn", "exported from index"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Settings screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the Settings placeholder with the house-rule card + Group / Rotation / Notifications / Danger-zone groups, wiring session-local toggles and the `GROUP_NAME` constant.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/api.ts`
- Rewrite: `mobile/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GROUP_NAME constant in lib/api.ts beside GROUP_ID
- house-rule card (mono kicker over serif rule), ember-free
- info Banner 'not saved yet'
- GROUP row shows GROUP_NAME, no since
- ROTATION two working toggles (skip on, guests off)
- NOTIFICATIONS disabled row w/ dimmed chevron
- DANGER ZONE disabled red Reset history + Leave group
- SectionLabel + cards + hairline dividers between rows only
- TODO(#41) seam
- no hardcoded tokens; just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`, then manual Expo pass per spec.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/api.ts", "mobile/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GROUP_NAME constant", "house-rule card", "info banner", "group row", "two working toggles with defaults", "disabled notifications row", "disabled danger rows red", "cards + hairline dividers", "TODO(#41) seam", "no hardcoded tokens"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
